company: Red Team Practice & Cyber Warfare Labs
points: Practiced red team methodologies in authorized cyber warfare labs and training environments.
Solved Capture The Flag (CTF) challenges and completed hands-on red team lab exercises focused on reconnaissance, exploitation, privilege escalation, persistence, and post-exploitation.
Earned practical offensive security certifications and continuously improved red teaming skills through hands-on practice, research, and lab-based simulations.
Gained experience using tools such as Metasploit, Nmap, Burp Suite, BloodHound, CrackMapExec, Hydra, Impacket, and other offensive security tools in controlled lab environments.
Performed authorized penetration testing exercises in vulnerable lab environments as part of eJPT training.
Practiced network reconnaissance, enumeration, exploitation, privilege escalation, and post-exploitation on intentionally vulnerable machines.
Solved Capture The Flag (CTF) challenges and documented findings to strengthen practical offensive security skills.
Create educational content on ethical hacking, penetration testing, red teaming, and offensive security concepts.
Publish practical walkthroughs, lab demonstrations, CTF write-ups, tool tutorials, and cybersecurity learning content on YouTube.
Build and share cybersecurity educational content with a growing community across YouTube and Instagram (40K+ followers).
Help beginners and aspiring penetration testers learn through hands-on lab-based demonstrations and structured learning resources.
